        return val * sign;
    }

    static List<int> Greedy()
    {
        var removed = new List<int>();
        var rem = new bool[n];

        while (true)
        {
            bool any = false;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (!rem[i] && selfLoop[i]) { rem[i] = true; removed.Add(i); any = true; }
            if (any) continue;

            var sccs = FindSCCsRemoved(rem);
            List<int> largest = null;
            foreach (var scc in sccs)
                if (scc.Count > 1 && (largest == null || scc.Count > largest.Count))
                    largest = scc;

            if (largest == null) break;

            int best = -1, bestDeg = -1;
            foreach (int v in largest)
            {
                int deg = 0;
                foreach (int w in adjOut[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                foreach (int w in adjIn[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                if (deg > bestDeg) { bestDeg = deg; best = v; }
            }
            rem[best] = true;
            removed.Add(best);
        }
        return removed;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where active[i]=true means vertex i is present
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCs(bool[] active)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];

                    result.Add(scc);

        }
        return result;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where removed[i]=true means vertex i is removed
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCsRemoved(bool[] removed)
    {

                    var scc = new List<int>();
                    int w;
                    do { w = stk[--sp]; onStk[w] = false; scc.Add(w); } while (w != v);
                    result.Add(scc);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
}

Subpass configurationView exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought
 0.1000
[DAG=5K, breakers=120] Execution timed out after 30 seconds

Feedback Vertex Set - DAG=5K, breakers=120

Graph: 5,120 vertices, ~15,474 edges | DAG subgraph: 5,000 | cycle-breaker vertices: 120

Approach: Now here's my complete C# solution:

View C# Code (10818 chars)
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;

class Program
{
    static int n;
    static int[][] adjOut, adjIn;
    static bool[] selfLoop;
    static bool[] anc, desc;

    static void Main()
    {
        var sr = new StreamReader(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        n = NextInt(sr);
        int m = NextInt(sr);
        var edges = new (int u, int v)[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
            edges[i] = (NextInt(sr), NextInt(sr));

        if (n == 0 || m == 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        var ao = new List<int>[n];
        var ai = new List<int>[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { ao[i] = new List<int>(); ai[i] = new List<int>(); }
        foreach (var (u, v) in edges) { ao[u].Add(v); ai[v].Add(u); }

        adjOut = new int[n][];
        adjIn = new int[n][];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjOut[i] = ao[i].ToArray(); adjIn[i] = ai[i].ToArray(); }

        selfLoop = new bool[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            foreach (int v in adjOut[i])
                if (v == i) { selfLoop[i] = true; break; }

        desc = new bool[n * n];
        var dfsStk = new Stack<int>();
        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            dfsStk.Clear();
            dfsStk.Push(s);
            while (dfsStk.Count > 0)
            {
                int u = dfsStk.Pop();
                foreach (int w in adjOut[u])
                    if (!desc[s * n + w]) { desc[s * n + w] = true; dfsStk.Push(w); }
            }
        }

        anc = new bool[n * n];
        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
            for (int t = 0; t < n; t++)
                if (desc[t * n + s]) anc[s * n + t] = true;

        var greedy = Greedy();
        int bestSize = greedy.Count;
        var bestSet = new List<int>(greedy);

        if (bestSize == 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        var active0 = new bool[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) active0[i] = true;

        var mainStk = new Stack<(bool[] act, int cnt, int[] cur)>();
        mainStk.Push((active0, 0, Array.Empty<int>()));

        long iters = 0;
        var sw = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
        var workBuf = new bool[n];

        while (mainStk.Count > 0 && sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < 180000)
        {
            iters++;
            var (curAct, curCnt, curArr) = mainStk.Pop();
            if (curCnt >= bestSize) continue;

            int nc = curCnt;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) workBuf[i] = curAct[i];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (workBuf[i] && selfLoop[i]) { workBuf[i] = false; nc++; }
            if (nc >= bestSize) continue;

            var sccs = FindSCCs(workBuf);
            int lb = 0;
            foreach (var scc in sccs) if (scc.Count > 1) lb++;
            if (nc + lb >= bestSize) continue;

            List<int> chosen = null;
            foreach (var scc in sccs)
                if (scc.Count > 1 && (chosen == null || scc.Count > chosen.Count))
                    chosen = scc;

            if (chosen == null)
            {
                if (nc < bestSize)
                {
                    bestSize = nc;
                    var merged = new int[nc];
                    int mi = 0;
                    foreach (int v in curArr) merged[mi++] = v;
                    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                        if (curAct[i] && selfLoop[i]) merged[mi++] = i;
                    bestSet = new List<int>(merged);
                }
                continue;
            }

            var cands = new List<(int w, int v)>();
            int chCnt = chosen.Count;
            foreach (int v in chosen)
            {
                int w = 0, base_i = v * n;
                for (int ci = 0; ci < chCnt; ci++)
                {
                    int u = chosen[ci];
                    if (u != v)
                    {
                        if (anc[base_i + u]) w++;
                        if (desc[base_i + u]) w++;
                    }
                }
                cands.Add((w, v));
            }
            cands.Sort((a, b) => b.w.CompareTo(a.w));

            var baseCur = new int[nc];
            int bi = 0;
            foreach (int v in curArr) baseCur[bi++] = v;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (curAct[i] && selfLoop[i]) baseCur[bi++] = i;

            for (int ci = cands.Count - 1; ci >= 0; ci--)
            {
                int v = cands[ci].v;
                var ba = new bool[n];
                for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) ba[i] = workBuf[i];
                ba[v] = false;
                var bc = new int[nc + 1];
                Array.Copy(baseCur, bc, nc);
                bc[nc] = v;
                mainStk.Push((ba, nc + 1, bc));
            }
        }

        Console.WriteLine(bestSize);
        if (bestSize > 0)
            Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", bestSet));
        else
            Console.WriteLine();
    }

    static int NextInt(TextReader r)
    {
        int c;
        while ((c = r.Read()) >= 0 && c != '-' && (c < '0' || c > '9')) ;
        if (c < 0) return -1;
        int sign = 1, val = 0;
        if (c == '-') { sign = -1; c = r.Read(); }
        while (c >= '0' && c <= '9') { val = val * 10 + (c - '0'); c = r.Read(); }
        return val * sign;
    }

    static List<int> Greedy()
    {
        var removed = new List<int>();
        var rem = new bool[n];

        while (true)
        {
            bool any = false;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (!rem[i] && selfLoop[i]) { rem[i] = true; removed.Add(i); any = true; }
            if (any) continue;

            var sccs = FindSCCsRemoved(rem);
            List<int> largest = null;
            foreach (var scc in sccs)
                if (scc.Count > 1 && (largest == null || scc.Count > largest.Count))
                    largest = scc;

            if (largest == null) break;

            int best = -1, bestDeg = -1;
            foreach (int v in largest)
            {
                int deg = 0;
                foreach (int w in adjOut[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                foreach (int w in adjIn[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                if (deg > bestDeg) { bestDeg = deg; best = v; }
            }
            rem[best] = true;
            removed.Add(best);
        }
        return removed;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where active[i]=true means vertex i is present
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCs(bool[] active)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];
        var lowlink = new int[n];
        var onStk = new bool[n];
        var stk = new int[n];
        int sp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) index[i] = -1;
        var rStk = new Stack<(int v, int ni, int ph)>();

        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            if (!active[s] || index[s] >= 0) continue;
            rStk.Clear();
            rStk.Push((s, 0, 0));

            while (rStk.Count > 0)
            {
                var (v, ni, ph) = rStk.Pop();

                if (ph == 0)
                {
                    index[v] = lowlink[v] = idx++;
                    stk[sp++] = v;
                    onStk[v] = true;
                    ni = 0;
                }
                else
                {
                    int child = adjOut[v][ni - 1];
                    if (lowlink[child] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = lowlink[child];
                }

                bool pushed = false;
                var outs = adjOut[v];
                for (int i = ni; i < outs.Length; i++)
                {
                    int w = outs[i];
                    if (!active[w]) continue;
                    if (index[w] == -1)
                    {
                        rStk.Push((v, i + 1, 1));
                        rStk.Push((w, 0, 0));
                        pushed = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if (onStk[w])
                    {
                        if (index[w] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = index[w];
                    }
                }

                if (pushed) continue;

                if (lowlink[v] == index[v])
                {
                    var scc = new List<int>();
                    int w;
                    do { w = stk[--sp]; onStk[w] = false; scc.Add(w); } while (w != v);
                    result.Add(scc);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where removed[i]=true means vertex i is removed
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCsRemoved(bool[] removed)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];
        var lowlink = new int[n];
        var onStk = new bool[n];
        var stk = new int[n];
        int sp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) index[i] = -1;
        var rStk = new Stack<(int v, int ni, int ph)>();

        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            if (removed[s] || index[s] >= 0) continue;
            rStk.Clear();
            rStk.Push((s, 0, 0));

            while (rStk.Count > 0)
            {
                var (v, ni, ph) = rStk.Pop();

                if (ph == 0)
                {
                    index[v] = lowlink[v] = idx++;
                    stk[sp++] = v;
                    onStk[v] = true;
                    ni = 0;
                }
                else
                {
                    int child = adjOut[v][ni - 1];
                    if (lowlink[child] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = lowlink[child];
                }

                bool pushed = false;
                var outs = adjOut[v];
                for (int i = ni; i < outs.Length; i++)
                {
                    int w = outs[i];
                    if (removed[w]) continue;
                    if (index[w] == -1)
                    {
                        rStk.Push((v, i + 1, 1));
                        rStk.Push((w, 0, 0));
                        pushed = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if (onStk[w])
                    {
                        if (index[w] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = index[w];
                    }
                }

                if (pushed) continue;

                if (lowlink[v] == index[v])
                {
                    var scc = new List<int>();
                    int w;
                    do { w = stk[--sp]; onStk[w] = false; scc.Add(w); } while (w != v);
                    result.Add(scc);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
}

    static int NextInt(TextReader r)
    {
        int c;
        while ((c = r.Read()) >= 0 && c != '-' && (c < '0' || c > '9')) ;
        if (c < 0) return -1;

        return val * sign;
    }

    static List<int> Greedy()
    {
        var removed = new List<int>();
        var rem = new bool[n];

        while (true)
        {
            bool any = false;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (!rem[i] && selfLoop[i]) { rem[i] = true; removed.Add(i); any = true; }
            if (any) continue;

            var sccs = FindSCCsRemoved(rem);

                    largest = scc;

            if (largest == null) break;

            int best = -1, bestDeg = -1;

                foreach (int w in adjIn[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                if (deg > bestDeg) { bestDeg = deg; best = v; }
            }
            rem[best] = true;
            removed.Add(best);
        }
        return removed;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where active[i]=true means vertex i is present
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCs(bool[] active)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];

                }

                    if (!active[w]) continue;
                    if (index[w] == -1)
                    {
                        rStk.Push((v, i + 1, 1));
                        rStk.Push((w, 0, 0));
                        pushed = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if (onStk[w])
                    {
                        if (index[w] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = index[w];
                    }
                }

                if (pushed) continue;

                if (lowlink[v] == index[v])
                {
                    var scc = new List<int>();
                    int w;
                    do { w = stk[--sp]; onStk[w] = false; scc.Add(w); } while (w != v);
                    result.Add(scc);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where removed[i]=true means vertex i is removed
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCsRemoved(bool[] removed)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];
        var lowlink = new int[n];
        var onStk = new bool[n];

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;

class Program
{
    static int n;
    static int[][] adjOut, adjIn;
    static bool[] selfLoop;
    static bool[] anc, desc;

    static void Main()
    {
        var sr = new StreamReader(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        n = NextInt(sr);
        int m = NextInt(sr);
        var edges = new (int u, int v)[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
            edges[i] = (NextInt(sr), NextInt(sr));

        if (n == 0 || m == 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        var ao = new List<int>[n];
        var ai = new List<int>[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { ao[i] = new List<int>(); ai[i] = new List<int>(); }
        foreach (var (u, v) in edges) { ao[u].Add(v); ai[v].Add(u); }

        adjOut = new int[n][];
        adjIn = new int[n][];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjOut[i] = ao[i].ToArray(); adjIn[i] = ai[i].ToArray(); }

        selfLoop = new bool[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            foreach (int v in adjOut[i])
                if (v == i) { selfLoop[i] = true; break; }

        desc = new bool[n * n];
        var dfsStk = new Stack<int>();
        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            dfsStk.Clear();
            dfsStk.Push(s);
            while (dfsStk.Count > 0)
            {
                int u = dfsStk.Pop();
                foreach (int w in adjOut[u])
                    if (!desc[s * n + w]) { desc[s * n + w] = true; dfsStk.Push(w); }
            }
        }

        anc = new bool[n * n];
        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
            for (int t = 0; t < n; t++)
                if (desc[t * n + s]) anc[s * n + t] = true;

        var greedy = Greedy();
        int bestSize = greedy.Count;
        var bestSet = new List<int>(greedy);

        if (bestSize == 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        var active0 = new bool[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) active0[i] = true;

        var mainStk = new Stack<(bool[] act, int cnt, int[] cur)>();
        mainStk.Push((active0, 0, Array.Empty<int>()));

        long iters = 0;
        var sw = System.Diagnostics.Stopwatch.StartNew();
        var workBuf = new bool[n];

        while (mainStk.Count > 0 && sw.ElapsedMilliseconds < 180000)
        {
            iters++;
            var (curAct, curCnt, curArr) = mainStk.Pop();
            if (curCnt >= bestSize) continue;

            int nc = curCnt;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) workBuf[i] = curAct[i];
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (workBuf[i] && selfLoop[i]) { workBuf[i] = false; nc++; }
            if (nc >= bestSize) continue;

            var sccs = FindSCCs(workBuf);
            int lb = 0;
            foreach (var scc in sccs) if (scc.Count > 1) lb++;
            if (nc + lb >= bestSize) continue;

            List<int> chosen = null;
            foreach (var scc in sccs)
                if (scc.Count > 1 && (chosen == null || scc.Count > chosen.Count))
                    chosen = scc;

            if (chosen == null)
            {
                if (nc < bestSize)
                {
                    bestSize = nc;
                    var merged = new int[nc];
                    int mi = 0;
                    foreach (int v in curArr) merged[mi++] = v;
                    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                        if (curAct[i] && selfLoop[i]) merged[mi++] = i;
                    bestSet = new List<int>(merged);
                }
                continue;
            }

            var cands = new List<(int w, int v)>();
            int chCnt = chosen.Count;
            foreach (int v in chosen)
            {
                int w = 0, base_i = v * n;
                for (int ci = 0; ci < chCnt; ci++)
                {
                    int u = chosen[ci];
                    if (u != v)
                    {
                        if (anc[base_i + u]) w++;
                        if (desc[base_i + u]) w++;
                    }
                }
                cands.Add((w, v));
            }
            cands.Sort((a, b) => b.w.CompareTo(a.w));

            var baseCur = new int[nc];
            int bi = 0;
            foreach (int v in curArr) baseCur[bi++] = v;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (curAct[i] && selfLoop[i]) baseCur[bi++] = i;

            for (int ci = cands.Count - 1; ci >= 0; ci--)
            {
                int v = cands[ci].v;
                var ba = new bool[n];
                for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) ba[i] = workBuf[i];
                ba[v] = false;
                var bc = new int[nc + 1];
                Array.Copy(baseCur, bc, nc);
                bc[nc] = v;
                mainStk.Push((ba, nc + 1, bc));
            }
        }

        Console.WriteLine(bestSize);
        if (bestSize > 0)
            Console.WriteLine(string.Join(" ", bestSet));
        else
            Console.WriteLine();
    }

    static int NextInt(TextReader r)
    {
        int c;
        while ((c = r.Read()) >= 0 && c != '-' && (c < '0' || c > '9')) ;
        if (c < 0) return -1;
        int sign = 1, val = 0;
        if (c == '-') { sign = -1; c = r.Read(); }
        while (c >= '0' && c <= '9') { val = val * 10 + (c - '0'); c = r.Read(); }
        return val * sign;
    }

    static List<int> Greedy()
    {
        var removed = new List<int>();
        var rem = new bool[n];

        while (true)
        {
            bool any = false;
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
                if (!rem[i] && selfLoop[i]) { rem[i] = true; removed.Add(i); any = true; }
            if (any) continue;

            var sccs = FindSCCsRemoved(rem);
            List<int> largest = null;
            foreach (var scc in sccs)
                if (scc.Count > 1 && (largest == null || scc.Count > largest.Count))
                    largest = scc;

            if (largest == null) break;

            int best = -1, bestDeg = -1;
            foreach (int v in largest)
            {
                int deg = 0;
                foreach (int w in adjOut[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                foreach (int w in adjIn[v]) if (!rem[w]) deg++;
                if (deg > bestDeg) { bestDeg = deg; best = v; }
            }
            rem[best] = true;
            removed.Add(best);
        }
        return removed;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where active[i]=true means vertex i is present
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCs(bool[] active)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];
        var lowlink = new int[n];
        var onStk = new bool[n];
        var stk = new int[n];
        int sp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) index[i] = -1;
        var rStk = new Stack<(int v, int ni, int ph)>();

        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            if (!active[s] || index[s] >= 0) continue;
            rStk.Clear();
            rStk.Push((s, 0, 0));

            while (rStk.Count > 0)
            {
                var (v, ni, ph) = rStk.Pop();

                if (ph == 0)
                {
                    index[v] = lowlink[v] = idx++;
                    stk[sp++] = v;
                    onStk[v] = true;
                    ni = 0;
                }
                else
                {
                    int child = adjOut[v][ni - 1];
                    if (lowlink[child] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = lowlink[child];
                }

                bool pushed = false;
                var outs = adjOut[v];
                for (int i = ni; i < outs.Length; i++)
                {
                    int w = outs[i];
                    if (!active[w]) continue;
                    if (index[w] == -1)
                    {
                        rStk.Push((v, i + 1, 1));
                        rStk.Push((w, 0, 0));
                        pushed = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if (onStk[w])
                    {
                        if (index[w] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = index[w];
                    }
                }

                if (pushed) continue;

                if (lowlink[v] == index[v])
                {
                    var scc = new List<int>();
                    int w;
                    do { w = stk[--sp]; onStk[w] = false; scc.Add(w); } while (w != v);
                    result.Add(scc);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where removed[i]=true means vertex i is removed
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCsRemoved(bool[] removed)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();
        int idx = 0;
        var index = new int[n];
        var lowlink = new int[n];
        var onStk = new bool[n];
        var stk = new int[n];
        int sp = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) index[i] = -1;
        var rStk = new Stack<(int v, int ni, int ph)>();

        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            if (removed[s] || index[s] >= 0) continue;
            rStk.Clear();
            rStk.Push((s, 0, 0));

            while (rStk.Count > 0)
            {
                var (v, ni, ph) = rStk.Pop();

                if (ph == 0)
                {
                    index[v] = lowlink[v] = idx++;
                    stk[sp++] = v;
                    onStk[v] = true;
                    ni = 0;
                }
                else
                {
                    int child = adjOut[v][ni - 1];
                    if (lowlink[child] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = lowlink[child];
                }

                bool pushed = false;
                var outs = adjOut[v];
                for (int i = ni; i < outs.Length; i++)
                {
                    int w = outs[i];
                    if (removed[w]) continue;
                    if (index[w] == -1)
                    {
                        rStk.Push((v, i + 1, 1));
                        rStk.Push((w, 0, 0));
                        pushed = true;
                        break;
                    }
                    else if (onStk[w])
                    {
                        if (index[w] < lowlink[v]) lowlink[v] = index[w];
                    }
                }

                if (pushed) continue;

                if (lowlink[v] == index[v])
                {
                    var scc = new List<int>();
                    int w;
                    do { w = stk[--sp]; onStk[w] = false; scc.Add(w); } while (w != v);
                    result.Add(scc);
                }
            }
        }
        return result;
    }
}

using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.IO;

class Program
{
    static int n;
    static int[][] adjOut, adjIn;
    static bool[] selfLoop;
    static bool[] anc, desc;

    static void Main()
    {
        var sr = new StreamReader(Console.OpenStandardInput());
        n = NextInt(sr);
        int m = NextInt(sr);
        var edges = new (int u, int v)[m];
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++)
            edges[i] = (NextInt(sr), NextInt(sr));

        if (n == 0 || m == 0)
        {
            Console.WriteLine("0");
            Console.WriteLine();
            return;
        }

        var ao = new List<int>[n];
        var ai = new List<int>[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { ao[i] = new List<int>(); ai[i] = new List<int>(); }
        foreach (var (u, v) in edges) { ao[u].Add(v); ai[v].Add(u); }

        adjOut = new int[n][];
        adjIn = new int[n][];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) { adjOut[i] = ao[i].ToArray(); adjIn[i] = ai[i].ToArray(); }

        selfLoop = new bool[n];
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)
            foreach (int v in adjOut[i])
                if (v == i) { selfLoop[i] = true; break; }

        desc = new bool[n * n];
        var dfsStk = new Stack<int>();
        for (int s = 0; s < n; s++)
        {
            dfsStk.Clear();
            dfsStk.Push(s);
            while (dfsStk.Count > 0)
            {
                int u = dfsStk.Pop();
                foreach (int w in adjOut[u])

                    chosen = scc;

            if (chosen == null)

                    bestSize = nc;
                    var merged = new int[nc];

                    foreach (int v in curArr) merged[mi++] = v;
                    for (int i = 0; i < n; i++)

        var removed = new List<int>();

        while (true)

            bool any = false;

            }
            rem[best] = true;
            removed.Add(best);
        }
        return removed;
    }

    // Iterative Tarjan's SCC where active[i]=true means vertex i is present
    static List<List<int>> FindSCCs(bool[] active)
    {
        var result = new List<List<int>>();

Test 38: Exact Cover (Python) Score: 0.00 / 16
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Python code to solve the **Exact Cover** problem.

Given a universe of elements and a list of sets, choose set indices such that:
1) every element is covered, and
2) no element is covered more than once.

The evaluator is strict: only the exact expected solution is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
U S
e1 e2 e3 ...
e1 e2 ...
... (S lines total)
```
- `U` = number of elements in the universe (elements are `0..U-1`)
- `S` = number of available sets
- each following line is one set, listed as space-separated element IDs

**Output format (stdout)**
```
SOLUTION
i1 i2 i3 ... ik
```
or
```
NO SOLUTION
```

- `i1..ik` are 0-based set indices into the input list.

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Indices are valid and distinct.
3. Chosen indices are exactly the planted exact-cover solution.

Write complete Python code that reads stdin and writes stdout.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Given a collection of sets, choose some of them so that every element in the universe appears in exactly one chosen set — no gaps and no overlaps. Think of tiling a floor with pre-cut pieces where every tile must be used exactly once and every square must be covered.

This is a classic NP-complete problem. Each test instance has exactly one valid solution, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the universe and set sizes.

 0.0000
[tiny: universe=40, sets=32] FAIL: Wrong index set (missing: 2, 3, 4, 5; extras: 12, 19, 22, 29)

Exact Cover - tiny: universe=40, sets=32

Universe: 40 elements | Total sets: 32 | Planted sets: 8 (block size 5) | Decoys: 24

Approach: Now let me present the final solution:

View Python Code (3568 chars)
import sys


def solve():
    lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
    if not lines:
        return

    first = lines[0].split()
    U = int(first[0])
    S = int(first[1])

    rows = []
    for i in range(1, S + 1):
        if i < len(lines):
            rows.append(list(map(int, lines[i].split())))
        else:
            rows.append([])

    # Edge case: empty universe is trivially covered
    if U == 0:
        sys.stdout.write("SOLUTION\n")
        return

    # Precompute: for each universe element, which rows (set indices) contain it
    col_to_rows = [set() for _ in range(U)]
    for r_idx, row in enumerate(rows):
        for c in row:
            if 0 <= c < U:
                col_to_rows[c].add(r_idx)

    # Quick feasibility check: every element must appear in at least one set
    for c in range(U):
        if not col_to_rows[c]:
            sys.stdout.write("NO SOLUTION\n")
            return

    row_elems = [frozenset(row) for row in rows]

    # ── Iterative Algorithm X with MRV (Minimum Remaining Values) heuristic ──
    ac = set(range(U))                # active (uncovered) elements
    ar = set(range(len(rows)))        # active (non-eliminated) rows
    sol = []                          # current partial solution (row indices)
    stk = []                          # backtracking stack: (saved_ac, saved_ar, candidates, next_idx)

    def do_bt():
        """Backtrack: restore state and try next candidate at a prior decision level."""
        while stk:
            sac, sar, cands, ni = stk[-1]
            if ni < len(cands):
                # Restore to this level's saved state
                ac.clear(); ac.update(sac)
                ar.clear(); ar.update(sar)
                sol.pop()
                # Try the next candidate row
                r = cands[ni]
                stk[-1] = (sac, sar, cands, ni + 1)
                # Eliminate all rows that share any element with r
                elim = set()
                for cc in row_elems[r]:
                    elim |= col_to_rows[cc]
                elim &= ar
                ac -= row_elems[r]
                ar -= elim
                sol.append(r)
                return True
            else:
                # All candidates at this level exhausted
                stk.pop()
                sol.pop()
        return False

    out = sys.stdout.write

    while True:
        # All elements covered → solution found
        if not ac:
            out("SOLUTION\n")
            out(" ".join(map(str, sol)) + "\n")
            return

        # MRV: pick the element with the fewest active covering rows
        best_c = -1
        best_n = len(rows) + 1
        need_bt = False
        for c in ac:
            n = len(col_to_rows[c] & ar)
            if n == 0:
                need_bt = True
                break
            if n < best_n:
                best_n = n
                best_c = c

        if need_bt:
            if not do_bt():
                out("NO SOLUTION\n")
                return
            continue

        cands = sorted(col_to_rows[best_c] & ar)
        if not cands:
            if not do_bt():
                out("NO SOLUTION\n")
                return
            continue

        # Choose the smallest-indexed candidate row
        r = cands[0]
        stk.append((ac.copy(), ar.copy(), cands, 1))
        elim = set()
        for cc in row_elems[r]:
            elim |= col_to_rows[cc]
        elim &= ar
        ac -= row_elems[r]
        ar -= elim
        sol.append(r)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()

Exact Cover - small: universe=80, sets=80

Universe: 80 elements | Total sets: 80 | Planted sets: 16 (block size 5) | Decoys: 64

Approach: Now let me present the final solution:

View Python Code (3568 chars)
import sys


def solve():
    lines = sys.stdin.read().splitlines()
    if not lines:
        return

    first = lines[0].split()
    U = int(first[0])
    S = int(first[1])

    rows = []
    for i in range(1, S + 1):
        if i < len(lines):
            rows.append(list(map(int, lines[i].split())))
        else:
            rows.append([])

    # Edge case: empty universe is trivially covered
    if U == 0:
        sys.stdout.write("SOLUTION\n")
        return

    # Precompute: for each universe element, which rows (set indices) contain it
    col_to_rows = [set() for _ in range(U)]
    for r_idx, row in enumerate(rows):
        for c in row:
            if 0 <= c < U:
                col_to_rows[c].add(r_idx)

    # Quick feasibility check: every element must appear in at least one set
    for c in range(U):
        if not col_to_rows[c]:
            sys.stdout.write("NO SOLUTION\n")
            return

    row_elems = [frozenset(row) for row in rows]

    # ── Iterative Algorithm X with MRV (Minimum Remaining Values) heuristic ──
    ac = set(range(U))                # active (uncovered) elements
    ar = set(range(len(rows)))        # active (non-eliminated) rows
    sol = []                          # current partial solution (row indices)
    stk = []                          # backtracking stack: (saved_ac, saved_ar, candidates, next_idx)

    def do_bt():
        """Backtrack: restore state and try next candidate at a prior decision level."""
        while stk:
            sac, sar, cands, ni = stk[-1]
            if ni < len(cands):
                # Restore to this level's saved state
                ac.clear(); ac.update(sac)
                ar.clear(); ar.update(sar)
                sol.pop()
                # Try the next candidate row
                r = cands[ni]
                stk[-1] = (sac, sar, cands, ni + 1)
                # Eliminate all rows that share any element with r
                elim = set()
                for cc in row_elems[r]:
                    elim |= col_to_rows[cc]
                elim &= ar
                ac -= row_elems[r]
                ar -= elim
                sol.append(r)
                return True
            else:
                # All candidates at this level exhausted
                stk.pop()
                sol.pop()
        return False

    out = sys.stdout.write

    while True:
        # All elements covered → solution found
        if not ac:
            out("SOLUTION\n")
            out(" ".join(map(str, sol)) + "\n")
            return

        # MRV: pick the element with the fewest active covering rows
        best_c = -1
        best_n = len(rows) + 1
        need_bt = False
        for c in ac:
            n = len(col_to_rows[c] & ar)
            if n == 0:
                need_bt = True
                break
            if n < best_n:
                best_n = n
                best_c = c

        if need_bt:
            if not do_bt():
                out("NO SOLUTION\n")
                return
            continue

        cands = sorted(col_to_rows[best_c] & ar)
        if not cands:
            if not do_bt():
                out("NO SOLUTION\n")
                return
            continue

        # Choose the smallest-indexed candidate row
        r = cands[0]
        stk.append((ac.copy(), ar.copy(), cands, 1))
        elim = set()
        for cc in row_elems[r]:
            elim |= col_to_rows[cc]
        elim &= ar
        ac -= row_elems[r]
        ar -= elim
        sol.append(r)


if __name__ == "__main__":
    solve()

Test 39: Graph Bisection (Rust) Score: 13.00 / 13
Typical Prompt:
You are writing Rust code to solve the **Graph Bisection** problem.

Given an undirected graph with an even number of vertices, split the vertices into two equal-size parts to minimize cut edges (edges with endpoints in different parts).

The evaluator is strict: only a minimum-cut valid bisection is accepted.

**Input format (stdin)**
```
n m
u v
u v
... (m lines total)
```
- `n` vertices labeled `0..n-1` (n is even)
- `m` undirected edges

**Output format (stdout)**
```
cut_size
v1 v2 v3 ... v(n/2)
```
- first line: reported cut size
- second line: vertices in partition A (exactly n/2 distinct indices)
- partition B is all remaining vertices

**What is checked**
1. Output format is valid.
2. Partition size is exactly `n/2` and vertices are valid/distinct.
3. Reported cut matches the actual cut.
4. The cut is minimum for the instance.

Write complete Rust code with `main` that reads stdin and writes stdout.
 Prompt Changes:
Prompt parameters change between subpasses (increasing difficulty)
Subpass 0
Parameters: (see typical prompt)View exact prompt
View raw AI output
View chain of thought

Split a graph’s nodes into two equally-sized groups so that as few edges as possible cross between the groups. Think of dividing a school into two teams where friends want to stay together — minimise the number of friendships that get split.

The test uses planted graphs that can be perfectly bisected with zero crossing edges, so grading is strict pass/fail. Subpasses increase the graph size.

 1.0000
[tiny: 40 vertices] PASS: minimum cut 0 in 0.02s

Graph Bisection - tiny: 40 vertices

Vertices: 40 | Edges: ~108 | Target partition size: 20 | Known optimum cut: 0

Approach: Here's my complete Rust solution for the Graph Bisection problem:

View Rust Code (10676 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read, Write, BufWriter};
use std::collections::HashSet;

fn main() {
    let mut inp = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut inp).unwrap();
    let mut tok = inp.split_whitespace();
    let n: usize = tok.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _m: usize = tok.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let mut edges: Vec<(usize, usize)> = Vec::new();
    while let Some(u) = tok.next() {
        let v = tok.next().unwrap();
        let ui: usize = u.parse().unwrap();
        let vi: usize = v.parse().unwrap();
        edges.push((ui.min(vi), ui.max(vi)));
    }
    edges.sort(); edges.dedup();
    edges.retain(|&(u, v)| u != v);

    let adj = build_adj(&edges, n);
    if !is_connected(n, &adj) {
        let pa = disconnected_bis(n, &adj);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, &edges);
        write_output(cut, &pa); return;
    }
    let (_opt, pa) = find_optimal_bisection(n, &edges);
    let cut = compute_cut(&pa, &edges);
    write_output(cut, &pa);
}

fn write_output(cut: usize, pa: &[usize]) {
    let stdout = io::stdout();
    let mut w = BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());
    writeln!(w, "{}", cut).unwrap();
    let s: Vec<String> = pa.iter().map(|x| x.to_string()).collect();
    writeln!(w, "{}", s.join(" ")).unwrap();
}

fn build_adj(edges: &[(usize, usize)], n: usize) -> Vec<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut adj = vec![vec![]; n];
    for &(u, v) in edges {
        if u < n && v < n && u != v { adj[u].push(v); adj[v].push(u); }
    }
    for nbrs in adj.iter_mut() { nbrs.sort(); nbrs.dedup(); }
    adj
}

fn is_connected(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> bool {
    if n <= 1 { return true; }
    let mut vis = vec![false; n];
    let mut stk = vec![0usize]; vis[0] = true;
    while let Some(u) = stk.pop() {
        for &v in &adj[u] { if !vis[v] { vis[v] = true; stk.push(v); } }
    }
    vis.iter().all(|&x| x)
}

fn disconnected_bis(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut comp = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut nc = 0u32;
    for i in 0..n {
        if comp[i] == 0 {
            nc += 1; let c = nc;
            let mut stk = vec![i]; comp[i] = c;
            while let Some(u) = stk.pop() {
                for &v in &adj[u] { if comp[v] == 0 { comp[v] = c; stk.push(v); } }
            }
        }
    }
    let mut sizes = vec![0usize; nc as usize + 1];
    for &c in &comp { sizes[c as usize] += 1; }
    let mut best_c = 0usize;
    for c in 1..=nc as usize {
        if sizes[c] <= n / 2 && sizes[c] > sizes[best_c] { best_c = c; }
    }
    (0..n).filter(|&i| comp[i] == best_c as u32).collect()
}

fn compute_cut(pa: &[usize], edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    let set: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
    edges.iter().filter(|(u, v)| set.contains(u) != set.contains(v)).count()
}

fn find_optimal_bisection(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> (usize, Vec<usize>) {
    let half = n / 2;
    let adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let lb = stoer_wagner(n, edges);
    if n <= 24 { return enumerate_bisections(n, half, edges, lb); }
    let mut best_pa: Vec<usize> = (0..half).collect();
    let mut best_cut = compute_cut(&best_pa, edges);
    for init_pa in vec![
        (0..half).collect::<Vec<_>>(),
        ((n - half)..n).collect(),
        (0..n).filter(|&i| i % 2 == 0).take(half).collect(),
        (0..n).filter(|&i| i % 2 == 1).take(half).collect(),
    ] {
        let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &init_pa);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    }
    if let Some(pa) = greedy_bfs(n, &adj, half) {
        let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    }
    let sw_pa = sw_partition(n, edges);
    let mut pa = if sw_pa.len() > half {
        (0..n).filter(|i| !sw_pa.contains(i)).take(half).collect()
    } else { sw_pa };
    while pa.len() < half {
        let s: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
        for i in 0..n { if !s.contains(&i) { pa.push(i); if pa.len() >= half { break; } } }
    }
    pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
    let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
    if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    let mut rng: u64 = 42;
    for _ in 0..50000 {
        let mut pa: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        for i in (1..n).rev() {
            rng = rng.wrapping_mul(6364136223846793005).wrapping_add(1442695040888963407);
            let j = (rng >> 33) as usize % (i + 1);
            pa.swap(i, j);
        }
        pa.truncate(half);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut {
            let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
            let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
            if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
        }
    }
    (best_cut, best_pa)
}

fn stoer_wagner(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    if n <= 1 { return 0; }
    let mut active = vec![true; n];
    let mut adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let mut best_cut = usize::MAX;
    for _ in 0..n - 1 {
        let start = active.iter().position(|&x| x).unwrap();
        let total = active.iter().filter(|&&x| x).count();
        let mut in_s = vec![false; n];
        let mut wt = vec![0usize; n];
        let mut last = start; let mut prev = start; let mut cnt = 1;
        in_s[start] = true;
        for &nb in &adj[start] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        while cnt < total {
            let (bv, _) = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && !in_s[i])
                .map(|i| (i, wt[i]))
                .max_by(|a, b| b.1.cmp(&a.1).then_with(|| a.0.cmp(&b.0))).unwrap();
            if cnt == total - 1 { prev = last; }
            in_s[bv] = true; last = bv; cnt += 1;
            for &nb in &adj[bv] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        }
        let cv = adj[last].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb]).count();
        if cv < best_cut { best_cut = cv; }
        let keep = prev.min(last); let rem_v = prev.max(last);
        active[rem_v] = false;
        let rn: Vec<usize> = adj[rem_v].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb] && nb != keep).cloned().collect();
        for &nb in &rn { adj[nb].push(keep); adj[keep].push(nb); }
    }
    best_cut
}

fn enumerate_bisections(n: usize, half: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)], lb: usize) -> (usize, Vec<usize>) {
    let mut best = usize::MAX;
    let mut best_pa: Vec<usize> = (0..half).collect();
    let mut mask: u64 = (1u64 << half) - 1;
    let full = (1u64 << n) - 1;
    loop {
        let cut = compute_cut_mask(mask, edges);
        if cut < best { best = cut; best_pa = mask_to_vec(mask, n); if best == lb { break; } }
        let c = mask & mask.wrapping_neg(); let r = mask.wrapping_add(c);
        mask = (((mask ^ r) >> 2) / c) | r;
        if mask == 0 || mask > full || mask.count_ones() as usize != half { break; }
    }
    (best, best_pa)
}

fn compute_cut_mask(mask: u64, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    let mut cut = 0;
    for &(u, v) in edges { if ((mask >> u) & 1) != ((mask >> v) & 1) { cut += 1; } }
    cut
}

fn mask_to_vec(mask: u64, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    (0..n).filter(|&i| (mask >> i) & 1 == 1).collect()
}

fn greedy_bfs(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>], half: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut in_a = vec![false; n]; let mut pa = Vec::with_capacity(half);
    let start = (0..n).min_by_key(|&i| adj[i].len())?;
    in_a[start] = true; pa.push(start);
    let mut boundary: HashSet<usize> = adj[start].iter().cloned().collect();
    while pa.len() < half {
        let best = boundary.iter().cloned().max_by_key(|&v| adj[v].iter().filter(|&&nb| in_a[nb]).count())?;
        in_a[best] = true; pa.push(best); boundary.remove(&best);
        for &nb in &adj[best] { if !in_a[nb] { boundary.insert(nb); } }
    }
    Some(pa)
}

fn sw_partition(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut active = vec![true; n]; let mut adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let mut best_cut = usize::MAX; let mut best_s: Vec<usize> = vec![];
    for _ in 0..n - 1 {
        let start = active.iter().position(|&x| x).unwrap();
        let total = active.iter().filter(|&&x| x).count();
        let mut in_s = vec![false; n]; let mut wt = vec![0usize; n];
        let mut last = start; let mut prev = start; let mut cnt = 1;
        in_s[start] = true;
        for &nb in &adj[start] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        while cnt < total {
            let (bv, _) = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && !in_s[i])
                .map(|i| (i, wt[i]))
                .max_by(|a, b| b.1.cmp(&a.1).then_with(|| a.0.cmp(&b.0))).unwrap();
            if cnt == total - 1 { prev = last; }
            in_s[bv] = true; last = bv; cnt += 1;
            for &nb in &adj[bv] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        }
        let cv = adj[last].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb]).count();
        if cv < best_cut {
            best_cut = cv;
            best_s = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && in_s[i] && i != last).collect();
            if best_s.is_empty() { best_s = vec![last]; }
        }
        let keep = prev.min(last); let rem_v = prev.max(last); active[rem_v] = false;
        let rn: Vec<usize> = adj[rem_v].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb] && nb != keep).cloned().collect();
        for &nb in &rn { adj[nb].push(keep); adj[keep].push(nb); }
    }
    best_s
}

fn local_search(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>], pa: &[usize]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let half = pa.len(); let mut pa = pa.to_vec();
    let set_a: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
    let mut pb: Vec<usize> = (0..n).filter(|i| !set_a.contains(i)).collect();
    drop(set_a);
    let mut in_a = vec![false; n]; for &v in &pa { in_a[v] = true; }
    let mut cut = cut_flag(&in_a, adj); let mut improved = true;
    while improved {
        improved = false;
        for i in 0..half { for j in 0..half {
            let ai = pa[i]; let bj = pb[j];
            let d = swap_delta(ai, bj, &in_a, adj);
            if d < 0 { in_a[ai] = false; in_a[bj] = true; pa[i] = bj; pb[j] = ai;
                cut = (cut as i32 + d) as usize; improved = true; }
        }}
    }
    pa
}

fn cut_flag(in_a: &[bool], adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> usize {
    let mut c = 0usize;
    for u in 0..adj.len() { if in_a[u] { for &v in &adj[u] { if !in_a[v] { c += 1; } } } }
    c / 2
}

fn swap_delta(ai: usize, bj: usize, in_a: &[bool], adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> i32 {
    let mut d = 0i32;
    for &nb in &adj[ai] { if nb != bj { d += if in_a[nb] { 1 } else { -1 }; } }
    for &nb in &adj[bj] { if nb != ai { d += if in_a[nb] { -1 } else { 1 }; } }
    if adj[ai].binary_search(&bj).is_ok() { d -= 1; }
    d
}

Node fill: green=reported partition A, amber=partition B. Node stroke: cyan/purple shows planted component membership. Red edges are crossing (cut) edges.

Graph Bisection - small: 80 vertices

Vertices: 80 | Edges: ~228 | Target partition size: 40 | Known optimum cut: 0

Approach: Here's my complete Rust solution for the Graph Bisection problem:

View Rust Code (10676 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read, Write, BufWriter};
use std::collections::HashSet;

fn main() {
    let mut inp = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut inp).unwrap();
    let mut tok = inp.split_whitespace();
    let n: usize = tok.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _m: usize = tok.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let mut edges: Vec<(usize, usize)> = Vec::new();
    while let Some(u) = tok.next() {
        let v = tok.next().unwrap();
        let ui: usize = u.parse().unwrap();
        let vi: usize = v.parse().unwrap();
        edges.push((ui.min(vi), ui.max(vi)));
    }
    edges.sort(); edges.dedup();
    edges.retain(|&(u, v)| u != v);

    let adj = build_adj(&edges, n);
    if !is_connected(n, &adj) {
        let pa = disconnected_bis(n, &adj);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, &edges);
        write_output(cut, &pa); return;
    }
    let (_opt, pa) = find_optimal_bisection(n, &edges);
    let cut = compute_cut(&pa, &edges);
    write_output(cut, &pa);
}

fn write_output(cut: usize, pa: &[usize]) {
    let stdout = io::stdout();
    let mut w = BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());
    writeln!(w, "{}", cut).unwrap();
    let s: Vec<String> = pa.iter().map(|x| x.to_string()).collect();
    writeln!(w, "{}", s.join(" ")).unwrap();
}

fn build_adj(edges: &[(usize, usize)], n: usize) -> Vec<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut adj = vec![vec![]; n];
    for &(u, v) in edges {
        if u < n && v < n && u != v { adj[u].push(v); adj[v].push(u); }
    }
    for nbrs in adj.iter_mut() { nbrs.sort(); nbrs.dedup(); }
    adj
}

fn is_connected(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> bool {
    if n <= 1 { return true; }
    let mut vis = vec![false; n];
    let mut stk = vec![0usize]; vis[0] = true;
    while let Some(u) = stk.pop() {
        for &v in &adj[u] { if !vis[v] { vis[v] = true; stk.push(v); } }
    }
    vis.iter().all(|&x| x)
}

fn disconnected_bis(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut comp = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut nc = 0u32;
    for i in 0..n {
        if comp[i] == 0 {
            nc += 1; let c = nc;
            let mut stk = vec![i]; comp[i] = c;
            while let Some(u) = stk.pop() {
                for &v in &adj[u] { if comp[v] == 0 { comp[v] = c; stk.push(v); } }
            }
        }
    }
    let mut sizes = vec![0usize; nc as usize + 1];
    for &c in &comp { sizes[c as usize] += 1; }
    let mut best_c = 0usize;
    for c in 1..=nc as usize {
        if sizes[c] <= n / 2 && sizes[c] > sizes[best_c] { best_c = c; }
    }
    (0..n).filter(|&i| comp[i] == best_c as u32).collect()
}

fn compute_cut(pa: &[usize], edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    let set: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
    edges.iter().filter(|(u, v)| set.contains(u) != set.contains(v)).count()
}

fn find_optimal_bisection(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> (usize, Vec<usize>) {
    let half = n / 2;
    let adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let lb = stoer_wagner(n, edges);
    if n <= 24 { return enumerate_bisections(n, half, edges, lb); }
    let mut best_pa: Vec<usize> = (0..half).collect();
    let mut best_cut = compute_cut(&best_pa, edges);
    for init_pa in vec![
        (0..half).collect::<Vec<_>>(),
        ((n - half)..n).collect(),
        (0..n).filter(|&i| i % 2 == 0).take(half).collect(),
        (0..n).filter(|&i| i % 2 == 1).take(half).collect(),
    ] {
        let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &init_pa);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    }
    if let Some(pa) = greedy_bfs(n, &adj, half) {
        let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    }
    let sw_pa = sw_partition(n, edges);
    let mut pa = if sw_pa.len() > half {
        (0..n).filter(|i| !sw_pa.contains(i)).take(half).collect()
    } else { sw_pa };
    while pa.len() < half {
        let s: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
        for i in 0..n { if !s.contains(&i) { pa.push(i); if pa.len() >= half { break; } } }
    }
    pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
    let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
    if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    let mut rng: u64 = 42;
    for _ in 0..50000 {
        let mut pa: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        for i in (1..n).rev() {
            rng = rng.wrapping_mul(6364136223846793005).wrapping_add(1442695040888963407);
            let j = (rng >> 33) as usize % (i + 1);
            pa.swap(i, j);
        }
        pa.truncate(half);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut {
            let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
            let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
            if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
        }
    }
    (best_cut, best_pa)
}

fn stoer_wagner(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    if n <= 1 { return 0; }
    let mut active = vec![true; n];
    let mut adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let mut best_cut = usize::MAX;
    for _ in 0..n - 1 {
        let start = active.iter().position(|&x| x).unwrap();
        let total = active.iter().filter(|&&x| x).count();
        let mut in_s = vec![false; n];
        let mut wt = vec![0usize; n];
        let mut last = start; let mut prev = start; let mut cnt = 1;
        in_s[start] = true;
        for &nb in &adj[start] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        while cnt < total {
            let (bv, _) = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && !in_s[i])
                .map(|i| (i, wt[i]))
                .max_by(|a, b| b.1.cmp(&a.1).then_with(|| a.0.cmp(&b.0))).unwrap();
            if cnt == total - 1 { prev = last; }
            in_s[bv] = true; last = bv; cnt += 1;
            for &nb in &adj[bv] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        }
        let cv = adj[last].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb]).count();
        if cv < best_cut { best_cut = cv; }
        let keep = prev.min(last); let rem_v = prev.max(last);
        active[rem_v] = false;
        let rn: Vec<usize> = adj[rem_v].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb] && nb != keep).cloned().collect();
        for &nb in &rn { adj[nb].push(keep); adj[keep].push(nb); }
    }
    best_cut
}

fn enumerate_bisections(n: usize, half: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)], lb: usize) -> (usize, Vec<usize>) {
    let mut best = usize::MAX;
    let mut best_pa: Vec<usize> = (0..half).collect();
    let mut mask: u64 = (1u64 << half) - 1;
    let full = (1u64 << n) - 1;
    loop {
        let cut = compute_cut_mask(mask, edges);
        if cut < best { best = cut; best_pa = mask_to_vec(mask, n); if best == lb { break; } }
        let c = mask & mask.wrapping_neg(); let r = mask.wrapping_add(c);
        mask = (((mask ^ r) >> 2) / c) | r;
        if mask == 0 || mask > full || mask.count_ones() as usize != half { break; }
    }
    (best, best_pa)
}

fn compute_cut_mask(mask: u64, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    let mut cut = 0;
    for &(u, v) in edges { if ((mask >> u) & 1) != ((mask >> v) & 1) { cut += 1; } }
    cut
}

fn mask_to_vec(mask: u64, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    (0..n).filter(|&i| (mask >> i) & 1 == 1).collect()
}

fn greedy_bfs(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>], half: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut in_a = vec![false; n]; let mut pa = Vec::with_capacity(half);
    let start = (0..n).min_by_key(|&i| adj[i].len())?;
    in_a[start] = true; pa.push(start);
    let mut boundary: HashSet<usize> = adj[start].iter().cloned().collect();
    while pa.len() < half {
        let best = boundary.iter().cloned().max_by_key(|&v| adj[v].iter().filter(|&&nb| in_a[nb]).count())?;
        in_a[best] = true; pa.push(best); boundary.remove(&best);
        for &nb in &adj[best] { if !in_a[nb] { boundary.insert(nb); } }
    }
    Some(pa)
}

fn sw_partition(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut active = vec![true; n]; let mut adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let mut best_cut = usize::MAX; let mut best_s: Vec<usize> = vec![];
    for _ in 0..n - 1 {
        let start = active.iter().position(|&x| x).unwrap();
        let total = active.iter().filter(|&&x| x).count();
        let mut in_s = vec![false; n]; let mut wt = vec![0usize; n];
        let mut last = start; let mut prev = start; let mut cnt = 1;
        in_s[start] = true;
        for &nb in &adj[start] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        while cnt < total {
            let (bv, _) = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && !in_s[i])
                .map(|i| (i, wt[i]))
                .max_by(|a, b| b.1.cmp(&a.1).then_with(|| a.0.cmp(&b.0))).unwrap();
            if cnt == total - 1 { prev = last; }
            in_s[bv] = true; last = bv; cnt += 1;
            for &nb in &adj[bv] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        }
        let cv = adj[last].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb]).count();
        if cv < best_cut {
            best_cut = cv;
            best_s = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && in_s[i] && i != last).collect();
            if best_s.is_empty() { best_s = vec![last]; }
        }
        let keep = prev.min(last); let rem_v = prev.max(last); active[rem_v] = false;
        let rn: Vec<usize> = adj[rem_v].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb] && nb != keep).cloned().collect();
        for &nb in &rn { adj[nb].push(keep); adj[keep].push(nb); }
    }
    best_s
}

fn local_search(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>], pa: &[usize]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let half = pa.len(); let mut pa = pa.to_vec();
    let set_a: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
    let mut pb: Vec<usize> = (0..n).filter(|i| !set_a.contains(i)).collect();
    drop(set_a);
    let mut in_a = vec![false; n]; for &v in &pa { in_a[v] = true; }
    let mut cut = cut_flag(&in_a, adj); let mut improved = true;
    while improved {
        improved = false;
        for i in 0..half { for j in 0..half {
            let ai = pa[i]; let bj = pb[j];
            let d = swap_delta(ai, bj, &in_a, adj);
            if d < 0 { in_a[ai] = false; in_a[bj] = true; pa[i] = bj; pb[j] = ai;
                cut = (cut as i32 + d) as usize; improved = true; }
        }}
    }
    pa
}

fn cut_flag(in_a: &[bool], adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> usize {
    let mut c = 0usize;
    for u in 0..adj.len() { if in_a[u] { for &v in &adj[u] { if !in_a[v] { c += 1; } } } }
    c / 2
}

fn swap_delta(ai: usize, bj: usize, in_a: &[bool], adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> i32 {
    let mut d = 0i32;
    for &nb in &adj[ai] { if nb != bj { d += if in_a[nb] { 1 } else { -1 }; } }
    for &nb in &adj[bj] { if nb != ai { d += if in_a[nb] { -1 } else { 1 }; } }
    if adj[ai].binary_search(&bj).is_ok() { d -= 1; }
    d
}

Approach: Here's my complete Rust solution for the Graph Bisection problem:

View Rust Code (10676 chars)
use std::io::{self, Read, Write, BufWriter};
use std::collections::HashSet;

fn main() {
    let mut inp = String::new();
    io::stdin().read_to_string(&mut inp).unwrap();
    let mut tok = inp.split_whitespace();
    let n: usize = tok.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let _m: usize = tok.next().unwrap().parse().unwrap();
    let mut edges: Vec<(usize, usize)> = Vec::new();
    while let Some(u) = tok.next() {
        let v = tok.next().unwrap();
        let ui: usize = u.parse().unwrap();
        let vi: usize = v.parse().unwrap();
        edges.push((ui.min(vi), ui.max(vi)));
    }
    edges.sort(); edges.dedup();
    edges.retain(|&(u, v)| u != v);

    let adj = build_adj(&edges, n);
    if !is_connected(n, &adj) {
        let pa = disconnected_bis(n, &adj);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, &edges);
        write_output(cut, &pa); return;
    }
    let (_opt, pa) = find_optimal_bisection(n, &edges);
    let cut = compute_cut(&pa, &edges);
    write_output(cut, &pa);
}

fn write_output(cut: usize, pa: &[usize]) {
    let stdout = io::stdout();
    let mut w = BufWriter::new(stdout.lock());
    writeln!(w, "{}", cut).unwrap();
    let s: Vec<String> = pa.iter().map(|x| x.to_string()).collect();
    writeln!(w, "{}", s.join(" ")).unwrap();
}

fn build_adj(edges: &[(usize, usize)], n: usize) -> Vec<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut adj = vec![vec![]; n];
    for &(u, v) in edges {
        if u < n && v < n && u != v { adj[u].push(v); adj[v].push(u); }
    }
    for nbrs in adj.iter_mut() { nbrs.sort(); nbrs.dedup(); }
    adj
}

fn is_connected(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> bool {
    if n <= 1 { return true; }
    let mut vis = vec![false; n];
    let mut stk = vec![0usize]; vis[0] = true;
    while let Some(u) = stk.pop() {
        for &v in &adj[u] { if !vis[v] { vis[v] = true; stk.push(v); } }
    }
    vis.iter().all(|&x| x)
}

fn disconnected_bis(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut comp = vec![0u32; n];
    let mut nc = 0u32;
    for i in 0..n {
        if comp[i] == 0 {
            nc += 1; let c = nc;
            let mut stk = vec![i]; comp[i] = c;
            while let Some(u) = stk.pop() {
                for &v in &adj[u] { if comp[v] == 0 { comp[v] = c; stk.push(v); } }
            }
        }
    }
    let mut sizes = vec![0usize; nc as usize + 1];
    for &c in &comp { sizes[c as usize] += 1; }
    let mut best_c = 0usize;
    for c in 1..=nc as usize {
        if sizes[c] <= n / 2 && sizes[c] > sizes[best_c] { best_c = c; }
    }
    (0..n).filter(|&i| comp[i] == best_c as u32).collect()
}

fn compute_cut(pa: &[usize], edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    let set: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
    edges.iter().filter(|(u, v)| set.contains(u) != set.contains(v)).count()
}

fn find_optimal_bisection(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> (usize, Vec<usize>) {
    let half = n / 2;
    let adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let lb = stoer_wagner(n, edges);
    if n <= 24 { return enumerate_bisections(n, half, edges, lb); }
    let mut best_pa: Vec<usize> = (0..half).collect();
    let mut best_cut = compute_cut(&best_pa, edges);
    for init_pa in vec![
        (0..half).collect::<Vec<_>>(),
        ((n - half)..n).collect(),
        (0..n).filter(|&i| i % 2 == 0).take(half).collect(),
        (0..n).filter(|&i| i % 2 == 1).take(half).collect(),
    ] {
        let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &init_pa);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    }
    if let Some(pa) = greedy_bfs(n, &adj, half) {
        let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    }
    let sw_pa = sw_partition(n, edges);
    let mut pa = if sw_pa.len() > half {
        (0..n).filter(|i| !sw_pa.contains(i)).take(half).collect()
    } else { sw_pa };
    while pa.len() < half {
        let s: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
        for i in 0..n { if !s.contains(&i) { pa.push(i); if pa.len() >= half { break; } } }
    }
    pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
    let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
    if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
    let mut rng: u64 = 42;
    for _ in 0..50000 {
        let mut pa: Vec<usize> = (0..n).collect();
        for i in (1..n).rev() {
            rng = rng.wrapping_mul(6364136223846793005).wrapping_add(1442695040888963407);
            let j = (rng >> 33) as usize % (i + 1);
            pa.swap(i, j);
        }
        pa.truncate(half);
        let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
        if cut < best_cut {
            let pa = local_search(n, &adj, &pa);
            let cut = compute_cut(&pa, edges);
            if cut < best_cut { best_cut = cut; best_pa = pa; }
        }
    }
    (best_cut, best_pa)
}

fn stoer_wagner(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    if n <= 1 { return 0; }
    let mut active = vec![true; n];
    let mut adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let mut best_cut = usize::MAX;
    for _ in 0..n - 1 {
        let start = active.iter().position(|&x| x).unwrap();
        let total = active.iter().filter(|&&x| x).count();
        let mut in_s = vec![false; n];
        let mut wt = vec![0usize; n];
        let mut last = start; let mut prev = start; let mut cnt = 1;
        in_s[start] = true;
        for &nb in &adj[start] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        while cnt < total {
            let (bv, _) = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && !in_s[i])
                .map(|i| (i, wt[i]))
                .max_by(|a, b| b.1.cmp(&a.1).then_with(|| a.0.cmp(&b.0))).unwrap();
            if cnt == total - 1 { prev = last; }
            in_s[bv] = true; last = bv; cnt += 1;
            for &nb in &adj[bv] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        }
        let cv = adj[last].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb]).count();
        if cv < best_cut { best_cut = cv; }
        let keep = prev.min(last); let rem_v = prev.max(last);
        active[rem_v] = false;
        let rn: Vec<usize> = adj[rem_v].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb] && nb != keep).cloned().collect();
        for &nb in &rn { adj[nb].push(keep); adj[keep].push(nb); }
    }
    best_cut
}

fn enumerate_bisections(n: usize, half: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)], lb: usize) -> (usize, Vec<usize>) {
    let mut best = usize::MAX;
    let mut best_pa: Vec<usize> = (0..half).collect();
    let mut mask: u64 = (1u64 << half) - 1;
    let full = (1u64 << n) - 1;
    loop {
        let cut = compute_cut_mask(mask, edges);
        if cut < best { best = cut; best_pa = mask_to_vec(mask, n); if best == lb { break; } }
        let c = mask & mask.wrapping_neg(); let r = mask.wrapping_add(c);
        mask = (((mask ^ r) >> 2) / c) | r;
        if mask == 0 || mask > full || mask.count_ones() as usize != half { break; }
    }
    (best, best_pa)
}

fn compute_cut_mask(mask: u64, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> usize {
    let mut cut = 0;
    for &(u, v) in edges { if ((mask >> u) & 1) != ((mask >> v) & 1) { cut += 1; } }
    cut
}

fn mask_to_vec(mask: u64, n: usize) -> Vec<usize> {
    (0..n).filter(|&i| (mask >> i) & 1 == 1).collect()
}

fn greedy_bfs(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>], half: usize) -> Option<Vec<usize>> {
    let mut in_a = vec![false; n]; let mut pa = Vec::with_capacity(half);
    let start = (0..n).min_by_key(|&i| adj[i].len())?;
    in_a[start] = true; pa.push(start);
    let mut boundary: HashSet<usize> = adj[start].iter().cloned().collect();
    while pa.len() < half {
        let best = boundary.iter().cloned().max_by_key(|&v| adj[v].iter().filter(|&&nb| in_a[nb]).count())?;
        in_a[best] = true; pa.push(best); boundary.remove(&best);
        for &nb in &adj[best] { if !in_a[nb] { boundary.insert(nb); } }
    }
    Some(pa)
}

fn sw_partition(n: usize, edges: &[(usize, usize)]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let mut active = vec![true; n]; let mut adj = build_adj(edges, n);
    let mut best_cut = usize::MAX; let mut best_s: Vec<usize> = vec![];
    for _ in 0..n - 1 {
        let start = active.iter().position(|&x| x).unwrap();
        let total = active.iter().filter(|&&x| x).count();
        let mut in_s = vec![false; n]; let mut wt = vec![0usize; n];
        let mut last = start; let mut prev = start; let mut cnt = 1;
        in_s[start] = true;
        for &nb in &adj[start] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        while cnt < total {
            let (bv, _) = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && !in_s[i])
                .map(|i| (i, wt[i]))
                .max_by(|a, b| b.1.cmp(&a.1).then_with(|| a.0.cmp(&b.0))).unwrap();
            if cnt == total - 1 { prev = last; }
            in_s[bv] = true; last = bv; cnt += 1;
            for &nb in &adj[bv] { if active[nb] && !in_s[nb] { wt[nb] += 1; } }
        }
        let cv = adj[last].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb]).count();
        if cv < best_cut {
            best_cut = cv;
            best_s = (0..n).filter(|&i| active[i] && in_s[i] && i != last).collect();
            if best_s.is_empty() { best_s = vec![last]; }
        }
        let keep = prev.min(last); let rem_v = prev.max(last); active[rem_v] = false;
        let rn: Vec<usize> = adj[rem_v].iter().filter(|&&nb| active[nb] && nb != keep).cloned().collect();
        for &nb in &rn { adj[nb].push(keep); adj[keep].push(nb); }
    }
    best_s
}

fn local_search(n: usize, adj: &[Vec<usize>], pa: &[usize]) -> Vec<usize> {
    let half = pa.len(); let mut pa = pa.to_vec();
    let set_a: HashSet<usize> = pa.iter().cloned().collect();
    let mut pb: Vec<usize> = (0..n).filter(|i| !set_a.contains(i)).collect();
    drop(set_a);
    let mut in_a = vec![false; n]; for &v in &pa { in_a[v] = true; }
    let mut cut = cut_flag(&in_a, adj); let mut improved = true;
    while improved {
        improved = false;
        for i in 0..half { for j in 0..half {
            let ai = pa[i]; let bj = pb[j];
            let d = swap_delta(ai, bj, &in_a, adj);
            if d < 0 { in_a[ai] = false; in_a[bj] = true; pa[i] = bj; pb[j] = ai;
                cut = (cut as i32 + d) as usize; improved = true; }
        }}
    }
    pa
}

fn cut_flag(in_a: &[bool], adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> usize {
    let mut c = 0usize;
    for u in 0..adj.len() { if in_a[u] { for &v in &adj[u] { if !in_a[v] { c += 1; } } } }
    c / 2
}

fn swap_delta(ai: usize, bj: usize, in_a: &[bool], adj: &[Vec<usize>]) -> i32 {
    let mut d = 0i32;
    for &nb in &adj[ai] { if nb != bj { d += if in_a[nb] { 1 } else { -1 }; } }
    for &nb in &adj[bj] { if nb != ai { d += if in_a[nb] { -1 } else { 1 }; } }
    if adj[ai].binary_search(&bj).is_ok() { d -= 1; }
    d
}
